ddls:
CREATE TABLE "complaints" (
  "complaint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each complaint */,
  "date_received" TEXT /* Date the complaint was received */,
  "issue" TEXT /* Description of the complaint issue */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the consumer submitting the complaint */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the consumer submitting the complaint */,
  "zipcode" TEXT /* Zipcode of the consumer submitting the complaint */,
  "submitted_via_id" INTEGER /* Method through which the complaint was submitted (foreign key to submission_methods) */,
  "date_sent_to_company" TEXT /* Date the complaint was sent to the company for response */,
  "company_response_id" INTEGER /* Response provided by the company regarding the complaint (foreign key to responses) */,
  "time_difference" INTEGER /* Time difference in seconds between the complaint received and resolved */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the complaint was resolved */,
  "resolution_description" TEXT /* Description of the resolution for the complaint */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("complaint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaints_submitted_via_id FOREIGN KEY ("submitted_via_id") REFERENCES submission_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaints_company_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_response_id") REFERENCES responses ("response_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submission_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the submission method (e.g., Web, Referral) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the submission method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company handling the complaint */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the company */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the company */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the company */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the company */,
  "zipcode" TEXT /* Zipcode of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response type */,
  "response_description" TEXT /* Description of the response provided to the complaint */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "complaint_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., New, In Progress, Resolved) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "complaint_status_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "complaint_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the complaints table */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the complaint_statuses table */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the status was updated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the users table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaint_status_history_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES complaint_statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaint_status_history_complaint_id FOREIGN KEY ("complaint_id") REFERENCES complaints ("complaint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaint_status_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., complaint handler, admin) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "complaint_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "complaint_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the complaints table */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the users table */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the complaint was assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaint_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaint_assignments_complaint_id FOREIGN KEY ("complaint_id") REFERENCES complaints ("complaint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_types" (
  "report_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report type */,
  "report_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the report type (e.g., complaint summary, user performance) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the report_types table */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report (e.g., CSV, PDF) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_report_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_type_id") REFERENCES report_types ("report_type_id")
)
